top_10.rationale: ACM Guidebook entry explicitly catalogued as a book — 'Towards Understanding Self-Supervised Representation Learning | Guide books'. Directly covers the topic including contrastive learning, auto-regressive LM, and self-prediction methods.

InTechOpen open-access book chapter titled 'Self-Supervised Contrastive Representation Learning in Computer Vision'. Book chapter format, peer-reviewed, directly covers contrastive self-supervised learning with a case study on image retrieval.

Springer book chapter on 'Self Supervised Contrastive Learning Combining Equivariance'. Published in a Springer volume (978-981-97-7244-5), directly relevant to contrastive self-supervised representation learning.

Comprehensive IEEE survey 'Self-Supervised Learning: Generative or Contrastive' — foundational reference that surveys the entire field of self-supervised representation learning including contrastive methods. Survey articles of this depth are the closest non-book approximation and frequently cited as book-level references.

PDF of the same TKDE21 foundational survey 'Self-supervised Learning: Generative or Contrastive'. PDF format suits book-mode reading intent; directly and comprehensively covers contrastive representation learning.

ResearchGate entry for 'Self-Supervised Contrastive Representation Learning in Computer Vision' — comprehensive paper covering the history and state of contrastive self-supervised learning; snippet confirms foundational coverage.

ScienceDirect 'A comprehensive survey on contrastive learning' — Elsevier journal publication with the depth and breadth characteristic of book-length reference material on contrastive self-supervised learning.
MDPI open-access 'A Survey on Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning' — survey directly on the query topic, covers pseudolabels, self-defined supervision, and contrastive objectives.

Stanford CS229 lecture notes PDF on self-supervised learning — structured like a textbook chapter, covers benefits and mechanics of self-supervised representation learning. Pedagogical, book-adjacent format.

SimCLR (arXiv 2002.05709) — foundational contrastive self-supervised learning framework paper, cited in virtually every book and survey on the topic; highest relevance among individual research papers in the pool.
